data.title: Encryption
data.description: Data in transit and at rest is encrypted using industry-standard practices.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 for network transactions and AES-256 for data storage.

data.title: Authentication Mechanisms
data.description: Multi-factor authentication and OAuth 2.0 for user session security.
data.technical_spec: Integration with social logins and proprietary mechanisms for user authorization.

data.title: Intrusion Detection
data.description: Monitors for unusual patterns indicating potential security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes a combination of anomaly detection algorithms and custom threat models.

data.title: Access Controls
data.description: Strict access policies for managing internal resources.
data.technical_spec: RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and policy enforcement across the platform.

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits and compliance checks ensure system integrity.
data.technical_spec: Conducted using both automated tools and human reviews to identify vulnerabilities.
